; reTasker: create or open a real notebook from the viewer.
;
; Injects a message-broker listener into MainView.qml (the always-instantiated
; top-level view container) so it is alive on the home screen and inside a
; notebook alike. The AppLoad viewer can't reach xochitl's controllers (separate
; QML engine), so it fires "retasker.newnote"; the native bridge in
; retasker-capture.so does the filesystem lookups (the "reTasker" folder, and any
; existing note with the same name) and forwards here over the broker pipe.
;
; New-note payload is JSON:
; {"name":"<title>","folder":"<uuid|empty>","existing":"<uuid|empty>","template":"<filename|empty>"}.
; If a note for that day already exists we just open it; otherwise we create one
; in the reTasker collection (creating the collection if the bridge found none)
; and open it -- using xochitl's own path, so no restart and correct on-disk format.
; The retasker.chooseTemplate signal opens xochitl's native template picker and
; asks the native bridge to persist the selected template for the AppLoad viewer.
;
; Plaintext identifiers resolve via the qt-resource-rebuilder hashtab, same as
; the other reTasker qmds.

AFFECT /qml/device/view/main/MainView.qml
    IMPORT net.asivery.XoviMessageBroker 2.0
    IMPORT net.asivery.AppLoad 1.0

    TRAVERSE ?#root
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            XoviMessageBroker {
                id: retaskerNoteBroker
                listeningFor: ["retasker.newnote", "retasker.chooseTemplate"]

                function templateLabel(template) {
                    if (!template)
                        return "Blank";
                    if (template.name)
                        return template.name;
                    if (template.title)
                        return template.title;
                    return template.filename ? template.filename : "Blank";
                }

                function findTemplate(filename) {
                    var wanted = filename ? filename : "Blank";
                    return Templates.list().find(function (t) { return t.filename === wanted; }) || null;
                }

                function reopenRetasker() {
                    Qt.callLater(function () {
                        AppLoadLauncher.launchApplication("retasker", [], ({}), false);
                    });
                }

                function saveTemplate(template) {
                    retaskerNoteBroker.sendSimpleSignal("retasker.template", JSON.stringify({
                        filename: template && template.filename ? template.filename : "",
                        name: templateLabel(template),
                        landscape: template && template.landscape === true
                    }));
                }

                function chooseTemplate(message) {
                    var req = {};
                    try { req = JSON.parse(message); } catch (e) { req = {}; }
                    var currentTemplate = findTemplate(req.template);
                    root.windowNavigator.open("document/window/template-selector", {
                        currentTemplate: currentTemplate,
                        onApplied: function (aTemplate, templateApplied, setRecent) {
                            if (templateApplied && aTemplate) {
                                saveTemplate(aTemplate);
                                if (setRecent)
                                    Templates.setRecentTemplate(aTemplate);
                            }
                            reopenRetasker();
                        },
                        onRejected: function () {
                            reopenRetasker();
                        }
                    });
                }

                function applyPreferredTemplate(doc, filename) {
                    var template = findTemplate(filename);
                    if (!template)
                        return false;
                    var page = doc.lastOpenedPage !== undefined ? doc.lastOpenedPage : 0;
                    DocumentController.setTemplateForPage(doc, page, template.filename);
                    LibraryController.setOrientation(doc.id, template.landscape ? Qt.Horizontal : Qt.Vertical);
                    return true;
                }

                function onSignalReceived(sgn, message) {
                    if (sgn === "retasker.chooseTemplate") {
                        chooseTemplate(message);
                        return "";
                    }

                    var req = {};
                    try { req = JSON.parse(message); } catch (e) { req = {}; }
                    var name = req.name ? req.name : "reTasker note";

                    // A note for this day already exists -> just open it.
                    if (req.existing && Library.entryForId(req.existing)) {
                        root.explorer.open(req.existing);
                        print("[retasker-newnote] opened existing " + req.existing + " name='" + name + "'");
                        return req.existing;
                    }

                    // Reuse the reTasker folder the bridge found, else create it.
                    var folderId = req.folder;
                    if (!folderId || !Library.entryForId(folderId))
                        folderId = Library.createCollectionWrapper("", "reTasker");

                    var id = LibraryController.createDocument(folderId, name);
                    var doc = Library.entryForId(id);
                    if (!doc) { print("[retasker-newnote] entryForId NULL for id=" + id); return "" + id; }
                    if (!applyPreferredTemplate(doc, req.template))
                        LibraryController.setOrientation(doc.id, Qt.Vertical);
                    root.explorer.open(doc.id);
                    print("[retasker-newnote] created+opened " + doc.id + " in folder " + folderId + " name='" + name + "'");
                    return "" + id;
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
